SYSTEM DROP REPLICA replica_name FROM SHARD shard_name;
SYSTEM RELOAD EXECUTABLE USER DEFINED FUNCTIONS;
SYSTEM WAIT UNTIL ASYNCHRONOUS LOADED DATA PARTS;
SYSTEM DROP TABLE IF EXISTS table_name;
CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM another_table LIMIT 1);
WITH (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table) AS total SELECT name FROM test_table WHERE id < total;
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW test_view ENGINE = SummingMergeTree() AS SELECT id, sum(id) AS sum_id FROM test_table GROUP BY id;
USE test_db; CREATE TABLE another_table (id UInt32, description String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT * FROM test_table JOIN another_table ON test_table.id = another_table.id;
CREATE TABLE test_table_2 (id UInt32, value DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table_2 SELECT id, now() FROM test_table;
SELECT id, count(*) FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING count(*) > 1;
SELECT id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM another_table) AS other_count FROM test_table;
